name: GIGABYTE B850M AORUS ELITE WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B850M AORUS ELITE WIFI6E Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5
description: Gigabyte micro-ATX motherboard for AM5 socket supporting DDR5 with Wi-Fi 6E and PCIe 5.0 support.
